creator: kp@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Leonid Evdokimov from comment #8)
> Another option I can think of is to implement machine-readable TSV and/or json output for `-T show` to replace regexp-based parsing with `awk` or jq`.

I'd quite like to see libxo (https://wiki.freebsd.org/LibXo) support for that short of thing. I'm not sure if it's reasonable to add that to pfctl itself or not. It may or may not be a better idea to have a standalone tool for table management grow that support.

A number, but not all, of the pf ioctl calls (and now also netlink calls) have been moved to libpfctl, making this work easier. I still intend to move all of them into libpfctl in due course.
